name: domain-mapper
description: Used when the user wants to research a domain, industry, market, technology, codebase, or competitor — turning scattered/unstructured information into a structured Markdown database (domain-map.md). Triggers on phrases like '帮我研究一下', '分析一下这个', '我不太熟悉这个领域'.
intent: Transform unstructured domain knowledge into a structured Markdown database through guided multi-step research: scope definition → snapshot (domain-map.md) → optional deep-dive (competitor-analysis.md) → optional social analysis (social-analysis.md) → synthesis
author: ReqForge

when: User wants to research a new domain, industry, or market
User asks to analyze a competitor or technology
User says they are unfamiliar with a domain and need context
User wants a structured map of a codebase or tech stack

commands.name: domain-mapper
commands.description: Research and map a domain to structured Markdown database
